Rows.IDAComment: update_time = get_update_time(); Encode4 in the SHARED HEADER, written FIRST (before nPOS/itemId) - definitively confirms updateTimeFirst=TRUE for gms_v95 @0x9eb4b7-0x9eb4c1
itemId - Encode4 @0x9eb4df-0x9eb4e3, then get_consume_cash_item_type(itemId) drives the type switch
message - shared cases 12/13/15/45 body, EncodeStr @0x9ebc59 (after CSpeakerWorldDlg/CUtilDlgEx message-input dialog returns)
whisper - Encode1 @0x9ebc75, ONLY emitted when type==13 (SuperMegaphone) or type==45; type==12 (Megaphone) skips this write
